step_rationale: Cardiac/muscle E3 ligase upregulated in myocardial injury.
mechanism: FBXO32 (atrogin-1) is a muscle-specific E3 ligase elevated during cardiomyocyte damage and proteolysis in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Circulating E3 ligases are novel and sensitive biomarkers for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
